title: Elizabeth Holmes Begins Her Defense in Fraud Trial
content: The U.S. rested its case after 11 weeks, and Ms. Holmes, the founder of the blood testing start-up Theranos, took the stand.
en_title: Elizabeth Holmes Begins Her Defense in Fraud Trial

title: A Hoffa Ally, Then a Foe, and Soon the Teamsters President
content: Sean O’Brien scored a decisive victory among union members after criticizing the current leadership as too timid in UPS talks and Amazon organizing.
en_title: A Hoffa Ally, Then a Foe, and Soon the Teamsters President
en_content: Sean O’Brien scored a decisive victory among union members after criticizing the current leadership as too timid in UPS talks and Amazon organizing.

title: Can a Machine Learn Morality?
content: Researchers at a Seattle A.I. lab say they have built a system that makes ethical judgments. But its judgments can be as confusing as those of humans.
en_title: Can a Machine Learn Morality?

title: Leased Your Car? You Could Get a Great Deal on It.
content: People who leased their cars before the pandemic can probably buy their vehicles at the end of the lease for much less than the going market price.
en_title: Leased Your Car? You Could Get a Great Deal on It.

title: How to Beat Retirement’s Nemesis: Inflation
content: With prices rising at their fastest rate in decades, people in retirement or approaching it should take extra care to protect their savings.

title: Buy Stocks to Prosper. Buy Bonds to Sleep at Night.

title: Global Rivalries Are Miring the Clean Energy Revolution

title: How Hunter Biden’s Firm Helped Secure Cobalt for the Chinese
content: The president’s son was part owner of a venture involved in the $3.8 billion purchase by a Chinese conglomerate of one of the world’s largest cobalt deposits. The metal is a key ingredient in batteries for electric vehicles.

title: C.D.C. Endorses Covid Vaccine Booster Shots for All Adults
content: As infections rise, Americans over 18 will be permitted to get extra doses. But it’s not clear boosters really are needed by so many people, or that the shots will turn back the pandemic.

title: The C.E.O. of Afiniti, an A.I. start-up, steps down after accusations of sexual assault.

title: Google questions if the new Justice Department antitrust boss can be impartial.

title: Japan approves a $490 billion economic stimulus package as the pandemic’s effects linger.
content: The move, announced on Friday, is an attempt by the country’s newish prime minister to revive an economy battered by Covid restrictions and a supply chain crunch.
